SEARCH
Package com.falkordb

Interface GraphPipeline

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, redis.clients.jedis.commands.BitPipelineBinaryCommands, redis.clients.jedis.commands.BitPipelineCommands, redis.clients.jedis.bloom.commands.BloomFilterPipelineCommands, Closeable, public interface GraphPipeline extends redis.clients.jedis.commands.PipelineCommands, redis.clients.jedis.commands.PipelineBinaryCommands, redis.clients.jedis.commands.RedisModulePipelineCommands, Closeable
An interface which aligned to Jedis Pipeline interface

    waitReplicas(int replicas, long timeout)
    Blocks until all the previous write commands are successfully transferred and acknowledged by at least the specified number of replicas.

  • Method Details

    • query

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> query(String query)
      Execute a Cypher query.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • readOnlyQuery

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> readOnlyQuery(String query)
      Execute a Cypher read-only query.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • query

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> query(String query, long timeout)
      Execute a Cypher query with timeout.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      timeout - timeout in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • readOnlyQuery

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> readOnlyQuery(String query, long timeout)
      Execute a Cypher read-only query with timeout.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      timeout - timeout in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • query

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> query(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
      Executes a cypher query with parameters.

      Parameter values are safely encoded as Cypher literals, so caller-supplied values cannot break out and inject Cypher — always pass untrusted input as a parameter rather than concatenating it into query. Unsupported value types (including BigDecimal), out-of-range integers, non-finite floating-point values, cyclic containers, non-String map keys, invalid parameter names, and a null query or params are rejected with IllegalArgumentException. This safety covers parameter values only — not the query text itself, dynamic labels/identifiers, or procedure names.

      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query. Must not be null.
      params - parameters map. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • readOnlyQuery

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> readOnlyQuery(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
      Executes a cypher read-only query with parameters.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query.
      params - parameters map.
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • query

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> query(String query, Map<String,Object> params, long timeout)
      Executes a cypher query with parameters and timeout.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query.
      params - parameters map.
      timeout - timeout in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • readOnlyQuery

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> readOnlyQuery(String query, Map<String,Object> params, long timeout)
      Executes a cypher read-only query with parameters and timeout.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query.
      params - parameters map.
      timeout - timeout in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a response which builds the result set with the query answer.

    • callProcedure

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> callProcedure(String procedure)
      Invokes stored procedures without arguments
      Parameters:
      procedure - procedure name to invoke
      Returns:
      a response which builds result set with the procedure data

    • callProcedure

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> callProcedure(String procedure, List<String> args)
      Invokes stored procedure with arguments
      Parameters:
      procedure - procedure name to invoke
      args - procedure arguments
      Returns:
      a response which builds result set with the procedure data

    • callProcedure

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> callProcedure(String procedure, List<String> args, Map<String,List<String>> kwargs)
      Invoke a stored procedure
      Parameters:
      procedure - - procedure to execute
      args - - procedure arguments
      kwargs - - procedure output arguments
      Returns:
      a response which builds result set with the procedure data

    • profile

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> profile(String query)
      Execute a Cypher query and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      Returns:
      a response which builds result set with execution plan and performance metrics

    • profile

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<ResultSet> profile(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
      Execute a Cypher query with parameters and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      params - parameters map
      Returns:
      a response which builds result set with execution plan and performance metrics

    • copyGraph

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<String> copyGraph(String destinationGraphId)
      Copies the graph
      Parameters:
      destinationGraphId - duplicated graph name
      Returns:
      a response which builds the copy running time statistics

    • deleteGraph

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<String> deleteGraph()
      Deletes the entire graph
      Returns:
      a response which builds the delete running time statistics

    • explain

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<List<String>> explain(String query)
      Get the execution plan for a given query.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      Returns:
      a response which builds the execution plan as list of strings

    • explain

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<List<String>> explain(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
      Get the execution plan for a given query with parameters.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query
      params - parameters map
      Returns:
      a response which builds the execution plan as list of strings

    • syncAndReturnAll

      List<Object> syncAndReturnAll()
      Synchronize pipeline by reading all responses. This operation close the pipeline. Whenever possible try to avoid using this version and use Pipeline.sync() as it won't go through all the responses and generate the right response type (usually it is a waste of time).
      Returns:
      A list of all the responses in the order you executed them.

    • sync

      void sync()
      Synchronize pipeline by reading all responses. This operation close the pipeline. In order to get return values from pipelined commands, capture the different Response<?> of the commands you execute.

    • waitReplicas

      redis.clients.jedis.Response<Long> waitReplicas(int replicas, long timeout)
      Blocks until all the previous write commands are successfully transferred and acknowledged by at least the specified number of replicas. If the timeout, specified in milliseconds, is reached, the command returns even if the specified number of replicas were not yet reached.
      Parameters:
      replicas - successfully transferred and acknowledged by at least the specified number of replicas
      timeout - the time to block in milliseconds, a timeout of 0 means to block forever
      Returns:
      the number of replicas reached by all the writes performed in the context of the current connection
